note: Seeded from reports/v4/scrutator/2026-04-26.datarim-kb.with-entities.json (36-query run, expand_entities=true). Gate mode is with-entities because the production /v1/ltm/recall endpoint defaults to expand_entities=true (RecallRequest model default) — the gate must defend the production retrieval path. The CI workflow invokes the harness with --expand-entities so observed and baseline are always the same mode. Live endpoint returned HTTP 500 on 2026-06-21 (PostgreSQL connectivity issue, not a recall regression); recalibrate via --update-baseline after the first clean CI run on arcana-db.
